nasb.text: And he walked about among the lions; He became a young lion, He learned to tear his prey; He devoured men.

esv.text: He prowled among the lions; he became a young lion, and he learned to catch prey; he devoured men,

cnv.text: 牠在獅子群中行走； 牠已成了一隻少壯的獅子， 牠學會了撕碎獵物， 把人吃掉。

ccb.text: 它出入狮群， 学会了捕食和吃人。
